column1: # Cross-chain gas cost comparison — per unit of gas and realistic (m=1) per-operation costs.
# Prices are POINT-IN-TIME (June 2026) and volatile: ETH=$1727 (re-verified)
# Per-operation gas-used figures are ESTIMATES — use eth_estimateGas against the compiled contract for real values.
# MegaETH base fee 0.001 gwei; storage gas is 0 at m=1 (the normal case). Optimism adds a variable L1 data fee NOT included below.
# Monad bills the gas LIMIT (not gas used) and min base fee ~100 gwei. Sei reportedly charges 72
